Welcome to calpinal limited







learn about us

WHO WE ARE

The company offers long term and short term investment opportunities, Calpinal Limited was established in 2019 and it initially began trading stocks, shares and bonds, it got involved in Forex Trading and Crypto-currencies in 2019 and was among the pioneer traders of Crypto-currencies in the advent of Bitcoin and Altcoins trading in 2018, when Crypto-currency trading was at it's peak. Calpinal Limited is currently managed by a senior team which has extensive experience in the development and implementation of systematic investment strategies. Calpinal Limited directors, together with the company’s employees and Employee Benefit Trust, currently own approximately 98% of the company. Aspect employs a team of over 130 professionals and invests heavily in the on-going research-driven evolution of its quantitative alpha-generating systems and their efficient implementation across a wide range of liquid asset classes. The company emphasises strong corporate governance and the provision of first class investor service to a client base which includes many of the world’s leading institutional investors. Calpinal Limited is a profitable and Trusted investment program, established by a strong team of highly skilled traders and investment consultants in the offline and online investment market. We put your investments in new highly remunerative innovative projects, which offers great returns along. Today our company has a professional team to develop a business. We know how much, where and when to put your investments. And we know how to achieve maximum income. We are constantly diversifying our investment portfolio and building stronger connections worldwide.

Our company consists of highly motivated and experienced professionals in many areas of financial activity. Our average customer type ranges from individual online entrepreneurs to banks and financial corporations willing to spare their savings in the times of global crisis.

Do not hesitate to start with us for expert investment services. View Certificate

01

Risk Free

Risk Management stratgies designed to enable a risk free investment process.

02

Expert Managers

Seasoned expert professionals knowledgeable in essential porfolio management.

Client Focused

04

World Class Services

Finetuned investment process and services rivalling top providers.





Getting
Started
  • Open an account
    Open an account by clicking on the Register link on our website and click on the open an accountes button. As soon as the page comes up, enter your personal information, with your email address and chosen password, and that is it. This shouldn't take more than a few minutes. Once you've done that, you'll receive a confirmation from us, and you're done. You're now an official member of our system.
  • Make your first deposit
    You will need to have make your deposit, and you can do this from the deposit section of your personal account. Choose from any of the investment plans that you like and make a deposit. The minimum deposit amount is affordable and you're allowed to make as many deposits as you see fit. However, every deposit is treated as a separate investment.
  • Watch your investment grow
    As soon as you've made your deposits, there is nothing else to do, except watch your earnings accrue according to the earning schedule of the plan that you have made deposit into. This can be fun, because it means you can be anywhere you want to be in the world, and your interest will still be added to your account daily, without you doing anything.
  • Initiate Withdrawals
    It doesn't take more than a few seconds to initiate your withdrawals and have your earnings paid to you. All your withdrawals are processed as soon as they are received, and your withdrawal will be processed to your provided wallet address.
  • Refer Your Friends
    You don't need an active deposit to take advantage of our affiliate offer. As long as you've signed up as a member, you have only to obtain your personal affiliate link from your personal account and share it with your friends. You get 10% first level commission for different 3 plan as soon as they join and make their first deposit.

Amazing Digital Experience

We operate on an Automated deposit and withdrawal process with an attractive user friendly system.

Attractive Investment Plans

We offer you a 3 unique attractive investment plans.

Award Winning Support

Our customer support agents are always available 24/7 to solve and answer your questions.

  1. Digital Experience
  2. Investment PlansThree unique plans
  3. Active Support24/7

OUR INVESTMENT PLANS

Investor Plan

  • 12% DAILY FOR 3 DAYS
  • MINIMUM : 200USD
  • MAXIMUM : 7,999USD
  • REFERRAL BONUS : 10%
  • INSTANT WITHDRAWAL

  • MINIMUM : 9,999USD
  • MAXIMUM : 27,999USD
  • REFERRAL BONUS : 10%
  • INSTANT WITHDRAWAL

Exclusive Plan

  • 18% DAILY FOR 3 DAYS
  • MINIMUM : 35,999USD
  • MAXIMUM : Unlimited
  • REFERRAL BONUS : 10%
  • INSTANT WITHDRAWAL
Sign Up 18%

Calpinal Limited offer Card to investors on EXCLUSIVE PLAN

The partnership aims to fill a gap in the traditional financial system that has left many without access to essential banking products. According to a 2017 survey by the FDIC, 25 percent of U.S. households are unbanked or underbanked, while global numbers have reached a staggering 1.7 billion, according to data released by the World Bank. Through BlockCard, Calpinal Limited investors can have a virtual card issued to them while a physical card is mailed to them. The card has a minimum of $1000 balance needed. It can be used at over 45 million merchants and ATMs – anywhere in the world where major credit cards are accepted.
